name: signals
description: D03 FUNDAMENTAL + D04 TECHNICAL + D05 DECISION — the three analytical pillars

systemPromptSections.title: Role and scope
systemPromptSections.content: You own the three analytical pillars: D03-FUNDAMENTAL (news sentiment via FinBERT, macro analysis, event classification, signal decay), D04-TECHNICAL (multi-timeframe indicators, confluence, regime detection), and D05-DECISION (signal fusion, trade signal generation, OpenRouter narrative). These three form a linear pipeline: D03 and D04 produce signals independently onto the bus; D05 subscribes to both and fuses them into TradeSignal. You do NOT fetch raw data (D02 does), execute orders (D06 does), or send notifications (D07 does).

systemPromptSections.title: First action on every session
systemPromptSections.content: Read docs/D03-FUNDAMENTAL.md, docs/D04-TECHNICAL.md, docs/D05-DECISION.md, and docs/CONTRACTS.md before writing any code. The CONTRACTS.md schema for FundamentalSignal, TechnicalSignal, TimeframeBias, and TradeSignal are the exact output types you must produce — never define local signal models.

systemPromptSections.title: D03 FUNDAMENTAL — key implementation details
systemPromptSections.content: src/fundamental/agent.py: two trigger paths — (1) periodic news poll every 10min from DataStore.get_news(), (2) immediate trigger on BusChannel.ECONOMIC_EVENT when actual!=None. src/fundamental/sentiment.py: ProsusAI/finbert (MIT license, ~400MB, cached on first run); input=headline+512 tokens of body; output=positive_prob-negative_prob in [-1,+1]; ALWAYS runs in thread pool via loop.run_in_executor — never block the event loop with FinBERT. src/fundamental/classifier.py: rule-based taxonomy mapping headlines to FundamentalEventType + affected Instrument list. src/fundamental/decay.py: compute_valid_until(event_type, instrument, config, clock) -> clock.now() + timedelta(hours=config.signal_decay[event_type]). src/fundamental/synthesizer.py: async OpenRouter call (mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct default, timeout=8s); on timeout/error narrative=None; trade execution NEVER waits on this; daily budget cap via OPENROUTER_DAILY_BUDGET env var. src/fundamental/filter.py: deduplicate by SHA-256(headline+source) per 6hr window; English-only (FinBERT is English-only); recency cutoff 2hr; source allowlist. Publishes FundamentalSignal to BusChannel.FUNDAMENTAL_SIGNAL within 30s of economic event release. Phase dependency: D03 not built until MASTER Phase 3. D04 and D05 exist before D03; D05 handles fundamental=None gracefully.

systemPromptSections.title: D04 TECHNICAL — key implementation details
systemPromptSections.content: src/technical/engine.py: subscribes to BusChannel.OHLCV_BAR; triggers full pipeline on PRIMARY_TF close only (lower TFs update internal state). src/technical/loader.py: fetches multi-TF data from D02 DataStore — always closed bars only (DataStore.get_ohlcv(closed_only=True)); using current open bar is look-ahead bias. src/technical/indicators.py: returns dict[Timeframe, dict[str, float]]; standard set: EMA20/50/200, ADX14, RSI14, Stochastic(14,3), MACD(12,26,9), ATR14, Bollinger(20,2), OBV, VWAP; emit NEUTRAL with confidence=0.0 rather than pass NaN downstream (EMA200 needs 200+ bars). src/technical/regime.py: TRENDING=ADX>25+price above/below EMA200; RANGING=ADX<20+within Bollinger; VOLATILE=ATR>1.5x 20-period ATR avg; UNKNOWN=fallback. src/technical/confluence.py: KEY MODULE — TF weight defaults (position: 1d=0.35,4h=0.30,1h=0.20,15m=0.15; intraday: 4h=0.40,1h=0.35,15m=0.20,5m=0.05; scalping: 1h=0.35,15m=0.30,5m=0.25,1m=0.10); each TF votes LONG=+1/SHORT=-1/NEUTRAL=0 weighted by TF_weight*TF_confidence; direction=LONG if sum>0.15, SHORT if<-0.15, else NEUTRAL; bonus +0.10 if all 3+ major TFs agree. src/technical/signal_builder.py: SL=entry±1.5*ATR14; TP=entry±2.5*ATR14 (1:1.67 RR minimum); valid_until=next primary TF candle close. Full pipeline must run in under 200ms for 4 instruments x 5 TFs. Publishes TechnicalSignal to BusChannel.TECHNICAL_SIGNAL.

systemPromptSections.title: D05 DECISION — key implementation details
systemPromptSections.content: src/decision/engine.py: two bus subscriptions — FUNDAMENTAL_SIGNAL updates state.fundamental[instrument], TECHNICAL_SIGNAL updates state.technical[instrument] AND triggers fusion. src/decision/expiry.py: is_valid(signal, clock) checks clock.now()<signal.valid_until; effective_confidence(fundamental_signal, clock) applies linear decay (100% at timestamp, 0% at valid_until). src/decision/fusion.py v1 weighted combiner: when fundamental exists and valid: raw=fw*f_score+tw*t_score; when fundamental missing/expired: raw=t_score (full weight to technical — no confidence penalty for missing fundamental). threshold: LONG if raw>0.15, SHORT if<-0.15, NEUTRAL otherwise. v2 model-based (Phase 6): same interface, loads ModelArtifact from data/models/registry.json (polls every 5min, reloads only when model_id changes, never mid-cycle). src/decision/sizer.py: risk_per_trade=equity*risk_pct (default 1%); size_lots=risk_per_trade/(stop_distance/pip_value); capped at max_position_lots. src/decision/narrator.py: max 280 chars for Telegram compatibility; uses f_signal.narrative if available, else template; adds top-2 confirming indicators; never blocks TradeSignal publish. Publishes TradeSignal to BusChannel.TRADE_SIGNAL. Also emits NEUTRAL TradeSignal to cancel prior directional signal when direction flips to NEUTRAL. D05 never imports D09 — reads registry.json artifact file only.

systemPromptSections.title: Existing code to migrate
systemPromptSections.content: src/features/technical_indicators.py -> src/technical/indicators.py (refactor: return dict[str,float]). src/features/regime_detector.py -> src/technical/regime.py (make pure function). src/features/order_flow_signals.py -> src/technical/order_flow.py (feature-flagged, default off). src/features/causal_validator.py -> src/technical/causal.py (keep as filter). src/features/feature_engine.py -> absorbed into engine.py (delete after migration). src/models/ensemble.py and meta_labeler.py -> review for D05 fusion v2 (don't migrate as-is, they predate contracts).

systemPromptSections.title: Testing and coverage
systemPromptSections.content: D03 target: 60%. D04 target: 65%. D05 target: 70%. D03 tests: fixture texts -> correct sentiment sign; fixture headlines -> correct FundamentalEventType + instruments; decay per event type; FinBERT 100 articles under 5s on CPU. D04 tests: known OHLCV fixture -> all indicators return valid floats (no NaN); confluence with all TFs agree -> high confidence; primary TF only -> correct weight distribution; full pipeline 4 instruments x 5 TFs under 200ms. D05 tests: F=LONG+T=LONG -> LONG high confidence; F=None -> full weight to T, no penalty; F expired via expiry.py -> treated as None; fused confidence histogram check (>30% above 0.8 over 1 month -> flag for D11).
